x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Tested VA topics produce reliable Now Assist experiences. Untested topics create broken self-service that damages AI adoption.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Test all published VA topics via the VA Test Simulation console before Now Assist enablement. Document and fix any broken flows. Target: 20+ published topics with evidence of recent maintenance (updated within 90 days).

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c20
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Tested VA topics produce reliable Now Assist experiences. Untested topics create broken self-service that damages AI adoption.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>VA Topic Testing and Simulation</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_topic');
    gaTotal.addQuery('active', true);
    gaTotal.addQuery('published', true);
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No published VA topics found',
            finding: 'No published VA topics found. Topic testing cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    // Topics updated in last 90 days — proxy for active maintenance
    var gaRecent = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_topic');
    gaRecent.addQuery('active', true);
    gaRecent.addQuery('published', true);
    gaRecent.addQuery('sys_updated_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaRecent.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaRecent.query();
    var recentlyUpdated = gaRecent.next() ? parseInt(gaRecent.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = total + ' published topics | ' + recentlyUpdated + ' updated in last 90 days';

    if (total >= 20 && recentlyUpdated >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' published topics with ' + recentlyUpdated + ' updated in the last 90 days, indicating active topic maintenance. Note: actual test simulation results must be manually verified in the VA Test Simulation console before Now Assist enablement.'
        };
    } else if (total >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: total + ' published topics but only ' + recentlyUpdated + ' updated recently. Topics may not be actively maintained — review and test via VA Test Simulation before Now Assist enablement.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + total + ' published topics (target: 20+). Ensure all published topics are tested via VA Test Simulation before Now Assist enablement.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>VIRTUAL_AGENT</module>
<number>CHK0006139</number>
<order>140</order>
<remediation_guidance>Test all published VA topics via the VA Test Simulation console before Now Assist enablement. Document and fix any broken flows. Target: 20+ published topics with evidence of recent maintenance (updated within 90 days).</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>8e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c20</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
